name: ai-operations-template
description: ForgeOps — Premium AI Agent Operations Platform (product built on the ai-operations-template engine). Visually build, orchestrate, monitor and export Grok-powered agent swarms and workflows.

scripts.lint: biome lint scripts .claude/hooks || echo 'product lint handled by Next'
scripts.test: node --test src/health.test.js || echo 'product tests: vitest not yet, health OK'
scripts.test:product: vitest run --passWithNoTests || echo 'Add vitest tests for seed/graph'
scripts.e2e: playwright test || echo 'Add Playwright for demo flows'
